case_title: LLSON W NEW VS. MARSHA COHEN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2014 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY NEW, LLSON W AS TO DEFENDANT COHEN, MARSHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-04-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 (SUBMITTED ON SC150 FORM - "REQUEST TO POSTPONE" - ORDER SIGNED BY SMALL CLAIMS JUDGE ) TRIAL OF OCT-16-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-26-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COHEN, MARSHA

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEW, LLSON W RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COHEN, MARSHA $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,275.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT COHEN, MARSHA
